tasks.description: Map complete RAG pipeline architecture - identify all components, data flow, and integration points
tasks.acceptance: Complete architecture diagram showing document ingestion, embedding, storage, retrieval, and generation flow

tasks.description: Identify all entry points and APIs that interact with RAG pipeline
tasks.acceptance: List of all API endpoints, GUI functions, and CLI commands that trigger RAG operations

tasks.description: Catalog all configuration parameters and environment variables affecting RAG behavior
tasks.acceptance: Complete configuration matrix showing env vars, defaults, and impact on pipeline

tasks.description: Analyze document processor - chunking strategies, format support, edge cases
tasks.acceptance: Detailed analysis of chunking behavior with various document types and sizes

tasks.description: Analyze vector store - embedding generation, similarity search, BM25 fusion
tasks.acceptance: Performance metrics and accuracy analysis for retrieval operations

tasks.description: Analyze LLM interface - backend switching, prompt handling, context management
tasks.acceptance: Analysis of all LLM backends (GGUF, Ollama, API) and switching logic

tasks.description: Analyze RAG engine - query transformation, context assembly, answer generation
tasks.acceptance: End-to-end query flow analysis with timing and quality metrics

tasks.description: Profile memory usage during document ingestion for various file sizes
tasks.acceptance: Memory profiling report showing peak usage and optimization opportunities

tasks.description: Measure query latency under different load conditions
tasks.acceptance: Latency benchmarks for single and concurrent queries

tasks.description: Test behavior on constrained hardware (low RAM, slow CPU simulation)
tasks.acceptance: Performance degradation analysis and minimum requirements validation

tasks.description: Analyze embedding model loading and caching behavior
tasks.acceptance: Model loading time and memory footprint analysis

tasks.description: Test empty documents, very large documents, and malformed content
Test empty queries, very long queries, and special characters
Test concurrent operations - multiple simultaneous queries and ingestions
Test failure recovery - database corruption, missing models, network failures
tasks.acceptance: Failure mode and recovery testing report

tasks.description: Evaluate retrieval accuracy with known ground truth documents
Test context assembly quality - relevance ranking, truncation handling
tasks.acceptance: Context quality assessment with various query types

tasks.description: Validate answer generation quality across different LLM backends
tasks.acceptance: Comparative quality analysis of GGUF vs Ollama vs API backends

tasks.description: Test hybrid search (vector + BM25) effectiveness
tasks.acceptance: Hybrid search performance vs pure vector search

tasks.description: Test complete API workflow - ingest, search, query, clear
Test GUI integration with RAG pipeline
Test CLI integration and batch processing
Validate authentication integration with RAG operations
Review SSRF protection in LLM URL validation
Test path traversal protection in document ingestion
Review authentication bypass scenarios
Test prompt injection resistance
Review API documentation accuracy against implementation
Review configuration documentation completeness
Test user-facing error messages clarity
Review migration and setup guides
Compile all findings into comprehensive RAG pipeline review report
tasks.acceptance: Complete RAG pipeline review report with executive summary

tasks.description: Create prioritized remediation plan for identified issues
tasks.acceptance: Prioritized action plan with severity ratings

tasks.description: Generate performance optimization recommendations
Document best practices and configuration recommendations
